articles.title: From small plunge pools to $150k for gunite, how New Englanders are leveling up their backyard swim
articles.description:
Here’s the latest in swimming pool trends — and how much it could cost you to install one.

The post From small plunge pools to $150k for gunite, how New Englanders are leveling up their backyard swim appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: New Englanders are investing in backyard pools, with costs ranging from $10k to $150k.
Gunite pools are the most expensive option, costing up to $150,000 for installation.
Increased pool installations may boost local economy and home values in Boston neighborhoods.
